subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! All praise be unto Thee for causing the lights of success and prosperity to shine, and the dawn to break forth in splendor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد بما اشرقت انوار الفلاح و النجاح و تبلج صباح
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @literal interpretation, @prayer for protection
